mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontMemberMapper.selectDuplicateMember */ SELECT ID, DI, MEMBER_STATUS_CD FROM ( SELECT ID, DI, MEMBER_STATUS_CD, 1 AS ord FROM MEMBER WHERE USE_YN = TRUE AND (ID = #{id} OR DI = #{di}) UNION ALL SELECT ID, DI, MEMBER_STATUS_CD, 2 AS ord FROM SECESSION_MEMBER WHERE ID = #{id} OR DI = #{di} ) x ORDER BY ord LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontMemberMapper.insertSecessionMember */ INSERT INTO SECESSION_MEMBER ( MEMBER_SEQ, MEMBER_TYPE_CD, ID, CI, DI, GOOGLE_SUB, GENDER_CD, TELECOM_SECTION_CD , NATIVE_SECTION_CD, PASSWORD, PASSWORD_CHANGE_DT, NAME, NICKNAME , INTRODUCTION, MOBILE_PHONE_NO, EMAIL, BIRTHDAY, JOIN_DT, RECENT_LOGIN_DT , RECENT_CONNECTION_DT, MEMBER_STATUS_CD, MEMBER_STATUS_CHANGE_DT , LOGIN_FAILURE_COUNT, AUTO_LOGIN_YN, APP_VERSION, OS_VERSION, OS_SECTION_CD , DEVICE_MODEL_NAME, DEVICE_MARKETING_NO, APP_PUSH_VALUE , SERVICE_TERMS_AGREE_YN, SERVICE_TERMS_AGREE_DT, PERSONAL_INFO_USE_AGREE_YN , PERSONAL_INFO_USE_AGREE_DT, MARKETING_USE_AGREE_YN, MARKETING_USE_AGREE_DT , USE_YN, REGISTER_SEQ, REGISTER_IP, REGISTRATION_DT, UPDATER_SEQ, UPDATER_IP , UPDATE_DT, SECESSION_DT ) SELECT MEMBER_SEQ, MEMBER_TYPE_CD, ID, CI, DI, GOOGLE_SUB, GENDER_CD, TELECOM_SECTION_CD , NATIVE_SECTION_CD, PASSWORD, PASSWORD_CHANGE_DT, NAME, NICKNAME , INTRODUCTION, MOBILE_PHONE_NO, EMAIL, BIRTHDAY, JOIN_DT, RECENT_LOGIN_DT , RECENT_CONNECTION_DT, 'SECESSION', NOW(3) , LOGIN_FAILURE_COUNT, AUTO_LOGIN_YN, NULL, NULL, NULL , NULL, NULL, NULL , SERVICE_TERMS_AGREE_YN, SERVICE_TERMS_AGREE_DT, PERSONAL_INFO_USE_AGREE_YN , PERSONAL_INFO_USE_AGREE_DT, MARKETING_USE_AGREE_YN, MARKETING_USE_AGREE_DT , USE_YN, REGISTER_SEQ, REGISTER_IP, REGISTRATION_DT, UPDATER_SEQ, UPDATER_IP , UPDATE_DT, NOW(3) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq}
